/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING AND MOTION TO SUPPRESS/TEXT:BENCH WARRANT STAYEDAND CONT'D/NP/X: NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT; A BENCH WARRANT IS ORDERED AND  STAYED TO 11-10-20/X: BAIL SET AT $10,000/X:LOVE WAIVER/CONTD:PHC & BENCH WARRANT STAY/DOPC/

/CAL:BENCH WARRANT RETURN/X:SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT IS DISCHARGED/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESS DAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE COURT DATE FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING ON 11-02-20 IN M11/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW/LDPX:11-03-2020 (30TH)/987,2/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,//DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT IS TO REPORT TO 70 OAK GROVE BY 09-23-2020 AT 12:00 PM ON THE NEXT BUSINESSDAY/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/X:DEFENDANT ADMONISHED TO STAY OUT OF HYDE (EAST), GEARY (NORTH), LARKIN (WEST) AND MARKET (SOUTH)/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND TO SET IN DEPT, 11/DOP/
